mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , C.longCalYn as longCalYn , C.ubcYn as ubcYn , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.isDel, IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo, A.createDate , case when @grp = date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate desc) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and 1=1
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}

SELECT BB.cnt as duplicated, IFNULL(CC.cnt, 0) as totalDuplicated, ifnull(getZoneNameForSamsung(TRIM(AA.pileNo)), 'ept') as zone, AA.name , AA.longCalYn , AA.ubcYn , AA.lavelNo , AA.machineNumber , AA.id , AA.deviceIdx , AA.currentDateTime , AA.location , AA.pileNo , AA.pileStandard , AA.drillingDepth , AA.intrusionDepth , AA.balance , AA.connectLength , AA.managedStandard , AA.avgPenetrationValue , AA.totalPenetrationValue , AA.hammaT , AA.fallMeter , AA.pileType , AA.method , AA.totalConnectWidth , AA.ultimateBearingCapacity , AA.crossSection , AA.hammaEfficiency , AA.modulusElasticity , AA.createDate, AA.isDel , AA.isDuple , AA.bigo , AA.sprCol1 , AA.constructionIdx ,
AA.peOne , AA.peTwo , AA.peThree , AA.peFour , AA.peFive , AA.peSix , AA.peSeven , AA.peEight , AA.peNine , AA.peTen ,
AA.peidOne, AA.peidTwo, AA.peidThree, AA.peidFour, AA.peidFive, AA.peidSix, AA.peidSeven, AA.peidEight, AA.peidNine, AA.peidTen ,
AA.piOne , AA.piTwo , AA.piThree , AA.piFour , AA.piFive ,
AA.pidOne , AA.pidTwo , AA.pidThree , AA.pidFour , AA.pidFive ,
AA.peLength
FROM ( SELECT name , longCalYn , ubcYn , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , isDel, isDuple, role , IF(bigo = 'null','', bigo) as bigo , IF(sprCol1 = 'null','', sprCol1) as sprCol1 , createDate, constructionIdx,
peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, peSix, peSeven, peEight, peNine, peTen ,
peidOne, peidTwo, peidThree, peidFour, peidFive, peidSix, peidSeven, peidEight, peidNine, peidTen ,
piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive ,
pidOne, pidTwo, pidThree, pidFour, pidFive ,
peLength FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , C.longCalYn , C.ubcYn , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.isDel, A.isDuple, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','', A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','', A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , A.createDate , B.constructionIdx ,
(SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen ,
(SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peidOne, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peidTwo, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peidThree, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peidFour, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peidFive, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peidSix, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peidSeven, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peidEight, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peidNine, (SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peidTen ,
ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive,
ifnull((SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본"),'') as pidOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단"),'') as pidTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as pidThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as pidFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(id = 0, '', id) as id FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단"),'') as pidFive,
(SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN VALUE IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS peLength FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5) as peLength
FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C
ORDER BY A.createDate DESC ) as TB) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, deviceIdx, pileNo, location FROM TB_REPORT WHERE deviceIdx = ${param.id} AND isDel = 0 GROUP BY deviceIdx, pileNo, location) BB ON AA.deviceIdx = BB.deviceIdx AND AA.pileNo = BB.pileNo AND AA.location = BB.location LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, pileNo, location FROM TB_REPORT WHERE deviceIdx = ${param.id} AND isDel = 0 GROUP BY pileNo, location) CC ON AA.pileNo = CC.pileNo AND AA.location = CC.location WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY AA.createDate DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT A.currentDateTime, count(*) as todayConstruction FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C
GROUP BY A.currentDateTime) AS AA

SELECT A.currentDateTime, COUNT(*) as todayConstruction FROM TB_REPORT A, TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C
group by A.currentDateTime ORDER BY A.currentDateTime DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx AND TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0) as duplicated, (SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 AND TB_REPORT.deviceIdx in ( SELECT TBD.id FROM TB_DEVICE TBD WHERE TBD.constructionIdx = TB.constructionIdx AND TBD.isDel = 0 AND TBD.conduct = 0 )) as totalDuplicated, ifnull(getZoneNameForSamsung(TRIM(pileNo)), 'ept') as zone, name , longCalYn , ubcYn , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate, isDel, isDuple,
todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
bigo, sprCol1, constructionIdx, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, peSix, peSeven, peEight, peNine, peTen , piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , C.longCalYn , C.ubcYn , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.isDel, A.isDuple, IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , A.createDate ,
A.todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
case when @grp = date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum,
B.constructionIdx, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본"),'') as piOne , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단"),'') as piTwo , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단"),'') as piFive FROM
(SELECT B.todayConstruction, A.* FROM TB_REPORT A , (SELECT currentDateTime, COUNT(*) AS todayConstruction FROM (SELECT currentDateTime, deviceIdx, pileNo, location, COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT
AND isDel = 0 GROUP BY currentDateTime , deviceIdx , pileNo , location) AA GROUP BY currentDateTime ORDER BY currentDateTime DESC) B
AND A.currentDateTime = B.currentDateTime) A ,
TB_REPORT A ,
TB_REPORT A ,
TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate desc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and 1=1
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx AND TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0) as duplicated, (SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 AND TB_REPORT.deviceIdx in ( SELECT TBD.id FROM TB_DEVICE TBD WHERE TBD.constructionIdx = TB.constructionIdx AND TBD.isDel = 0 AND TBD.conduct = 0 )) as totalDuplicated, ifnull(getZoneNameForSamsung(TRIM(pileNo)), 'ept') as zone, name , longCalYn , ubcYn , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate, isDel, isDuple,
todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
bigo, sprCol1, constructionIdx, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , C.longCalYn , C.ubcYn , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.isDel, A.isDuple, IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , A.createDate ,
A.todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
'0' as todayConstruction,
case when @grp = date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum,
B.constructionIdx, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive
FROM
(SELECT B.todayConstruction, A.* FROM TB_REPORT A , (SELECT currentDateTime, COUNT(*) AS todayConstruction FROM (SELECT currentDateTime, deviceIdx, pileNo, location, COUNT(*) FROM TB_REPORT
AND isDel = 0 GROUP BY currentDateTime , deviceIdx , pileNo , location) AA GROUP BY currentDateTime ORDER BY currentDateTime DESC) B
AND A.currentDateTime = B.currentDateTime) A ,
TB_REPORT A ,
TB_REPORT A ,
TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate desc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and 1=1
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY createDate DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{startRow}

SELECT (select count(*) from TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT.isDel = 0) as duplicated, (SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 AND TB_REPORT.deviceIdx in ( SELECT TBD.id FROM TB_DEVICE TBD WHERE TBD.constructionIdx = TB.constructionIdx AND TBD.isDel = 0 AND TBD.conduct = 0 )) as totalDuplicated,
name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , A.createDate , C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , case when @grp = date_format(A.createDate, '%Y-%m-%d') then @rownum:=@rownum + 1 else @rownum :=1 end as rownum, (@grp := date_format(A.currentDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d')) as dum , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C , (select @rownum:=0, @grp:='') r
ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB where 1=1
and rownum = 1
and currentDateTime = curdate()
and currentDateTime = #{param.date}
ORDER BY createDate ASC

SELECT BB.cnt as duplicated, IFNULL(CC.cnt, 0) as totalDuplicated, AA.name , AA.lavelNo , AA.machineNumber , AA.id , AA.deviceIdx , AA.currentDateTime , AA.location , AA.pileNo , AA.pileStandard , AA.drillingDepth , AA.intrusionDepth , AA.balance , AA.connectLength , AA.managedStandard , AA.avgPenetrationValue , AA.totalPenetrationValue , AA.hammaT , AA.fallMeter , AA.pileType , AA.method , AA.totalConnectWidth , AA.ultimateBearingCapacity , AA.crossSection , AA.hammaEfficiency , AA.modulusElasticity , AA.createDate , AA.role, AA.isDel, AA.bigo, AA.sprCol1, AA.peOne, AA.peTwo, AA.peThree, AA.peFour, AA.peFive, AA.peSix, AA.peSeven, AA.peEight, AA.peNine, AA.peTen, AA.piOne, AA.piTwo, AA.piThree, AA.piFour, AA.piFive, AA.constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, peSix, peSeven, peEight, peNine, peTen, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive, constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive, A.createDate, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id and C.id = #{param.constructionIdx} and A.isdel = 0 ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, deviceIdx, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} ) and isDel = 0 group by deviceIdx, pileNo, location) BB ON AA.deviceIdx = BB.deviceIdx AND AA.pileNo = BB.pileNo AND AA.location = BB.location LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0 AND conduct = 0 ) and isDel = 0 group by pileNo, location) CC ON AA.pileNo = CC.pileNo AND AA.location = CC.location
ORDER BY AA.machineNumber , AA.createDate ASC

SELECT BB.cnt as duplicated, IFNULL(CC.cnt, 0) as totalDuplicated, AA.name , AA.lavelNo , AA.machineNumber , AA.id , AA.deviceIdx , AA.currentDateTime , AA.location , AA.pileNo , AA.pileStandard , AA.drillingDepth , AA.intrusionDepth , AA.balance , AA.connectLength , AA.managedStandard , AA.avgPenetrationValue , AA.totalPenetrationValue , AA.hammaT , AA.fallMeter , AA.pileType , AA.method , AA.totalConnectWidth , AA.ultimateBearingCapacity , AA.crossSection , AA.hammaEfficiency , AA.modulusElasticity , AA.createDate , AA.role, AA.isDel, AA.bigo, AA.sprCol1, AA.peOne, AA.peTwo, AA.peThree, AA.peFour, AA.peFive, AA.piOne, AA.piTwo, AA.piThree, AA.piFour, AA.piFive, AA.constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive, constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive, A.createDate, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id and C.id = #{param.constructionIdx} and A.isdel = 0 ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, deviceIdx, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} ) and isDel = 0 group by deviceIdx, pileNo, location) BB ON AA.deviceIdx = BB.deviceIdx AND AA.pileNo = BB.pileNo AND AA.location = BB.location LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0 AND conduct = 0 ) and isDel = 0 group by pileNo, location) CC ON AA.pileNo = CC.pileNo AND AA.location = CC.location
ORDER BY AA.machineNumber , AA.createDate ASC

SELECT BB.cnt as duplicated, IFNULL(CC.cnt, 0) as totalDuplicated, AA.name , AA.lavelNo , AA.machineNumber , AA.id , AA.deviceIdx , AA.currentDateTime , AA.location , AA.pileNo , AA.pileStandard , AA.drillingDepth , AA.intrusionDepth , AA.balance , AA.connectLength , AA.managedStandard , AA.avgPenetrationValue , AA.totalPenetrationValue , AA.hammaT , AA.fallMeter , AA.pileType , AA.method , AA.totalConnectWidth , AA.ultimateBearingCapacity , AA.crossSection , AA.hammaEfficiency , AA.modulusElasticity , AA.createDate , AA.role, AA.isDel, AA.bigo, AA.sprCol1, AA.peOne, AA.peTwo, AA.peThree, AA.peFour, AA.peFive, AA.peSix, AA.peSeven, AA.peEight, AA.peNine, AA.peTen, AA.piOne, AA.piTwo, AA.piThree, AA.piFour, AA.piFive, AA.constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, peSix, peSeven, peEight, peNine, peTen, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive, constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive, A.createDate, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id and C.id = #{param.constructionIdx} and A.isdel = 0 ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, deviceIdx, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} ) and isDel = 0 group by deviceIdx, pileNo, location) BB ON AA.deviceIdx = BB.deviceIdx AND AA.pileNo = BB.pileNo AND AA.location = BB.location LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0 AND conduct = 0 ) and isDel = 0 group by pileNo, location) CC ON AA.pileNo = CC.pileNo AND AA.location = CC.location
AND AA.deviceIdx = ${param.id} ORDER BY AA.machineNumber , AA.createDate ASC

SELECT BB.cnt as duplicated, IFNULL(CC.cnt, 0) as totalDuplicated, AA.name , AA.lavelNo , AA.machineNumber , AA.id , AA.deviceIdx , AA.currentDateTime , AA.location , AA.pileNo , AA.pileStandard , AA.drillingDepth , AA.intrusionDepth , AA.balance , AA.connectLength , AA.managedStandard , AA.avgPenetrationValue , AA.totalPenetrationValue , AA.hammaT , AA.fallMeter , AA.pileType , AA.method , AA.totalConnectWidth , AA.ultimateBearingCapacity , AA.crossSection , AA.hammaEfficiency , AA.modulusElasticity , AA.createDate , AA.role, AA.isDel, AA.bigo, AA.sprCol1, AA.peOne, AA.peTwo, AA.peThree, AA.peFour, AA.peFive, AA.piOne, AA.piTwo, AA.piThree, AA.piFour, AA.piFive, AA.constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT name , lavelNo , machineNumber , id , deviceIdx , currentDateTime , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role, isDel, bigo, sprCol1, peOne, peTwo, peThree, peFour, peFive, piOne, piTwo, piThree, piFour, piFive, constructionIdx FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel, A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour, (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour, ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive, A.createDate, C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id and C.id = #{param.constructionIdx} and A.isdel = 0 ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB) AA LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, deviceIdx, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} ) and isDel = 0 group by deviceIdx, pileNo, location) BB ON AA.deviceIdx = BB.deviceIdx AND AA.pileNo = BB.pileNo AND AA.location = BB.location LEFT OUTER JOIN (select count(*) as cnt, pileNo, location from TB_REPORT where deviceIdx in (select id from TB_DEVICE where constructionIdx = #{param.constructionIdx} AND isDel = 0 AND conduct = 0 ) and isDel = 0 group by pileNo, location) CC ON AA.pileNo = CC.pileNo AND AA.location = CC.location
AND AA.deviceIdx = ${param.id} ORDER BY AA.machineNumber , AA.createDate ASC

SELECT id , deviceIdx , constructionIdx , machineNumber , currentDateTime ,( select count(*) from TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT.isDel = 0) as duplicated ,( SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 AND TB_REPORT.deviceIdx in ( SELECT TBD.id FROM TB_DEVICE TBD WHERE TBD.constructionIdx = TB.constructionIdx AND TBD.isDel = 0 AND TBD.conduct = 0 )) as totalDuplicated ,( SELECT IF(role = 0, CONCAT(CONCAT(IFNULL((SELECT groupName from TB_GROUP WHERE TB_GROUP.idx = TB_CONSTRUCTION.groupIdx), '') , CONCAT(' ',NAME)) , CONCAT(' ',LOCATION)), LOCATION) AS NAME FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION WHERE id = TB.constructionIdx ) as name , lavelNo , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role , isDel , bigo , sprCol1 , peOne , peTwo , peThree , peFour , peFive , peSix , peSeven , peEight , peNine , peTen , piOne , piTwo , piThree , piFour , piFive FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive , A.createDate , C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE 1=1 AND A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id AND C.id = #{constructionIdx} AND B.machineNumber = #{machineNumber} AND A.currentDateTime = #{currentDateTime} AND A.isdel = 0 ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY machineNumber , createDate ASC

SELECT id , deviceIdx , constructionIdx , machineNumber , currentDateTime ,( select count(*) from TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.deviceIdx = TB.deviceIdx and TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo and TB_REPORT.location = TB.location and TB_REPORT.isDel = 0) as duplicated ,( SELECT count(*) FROM TB_REPORT WHERE TB_REPORT.pileNo = TB.pileNo AND TB_REPORT.location = TB.location AND TB_REPORT.isDel = 0 AND TB_REPORT.deviceIdx in ( SELECT TBD.id FROM TB_DEVICE TBD WHERE TBD.constructionIdx = TB.constructionIdx AND TBD.isDel = 0 AND TBD.conduct = 0 )) as totalDuplicated ,( SELECT IF(role = 0, CONCAT(CONCAT(IFNULL((SELECT groupName from TB_GROUP WHERE TB_GROUP.idx = TB_CONSTRUCTION.groupIdx), '') , CONCAT(' ',NAME)) , CONCAT(' ',LOCATION)), LOCATION) AS NAME FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION WHERE id = TB.constructionIdx ) as name , lavelNo , location , pileNo , pileStandard , drillingDepth , intrusionDepth , balance , connectLength , managedStandard , avgPenetrationValue , totalPenetrationValue , hammaT , fallMeter , pileType , method , totalConnectWidth , ultimateBearingCapacity , crossSection , hammaEfficiency , modulusElasticity , createDate , role , isDel , bigo , sprCol1 , peOne , peTwo , peThree , peFour , peFive , peSix , peSeven , peEight , peNine , peTen , piOne , piTwo , piThree , piFour , piFive FROM ( SELECT C.name as name , B.lavelNo as lavelNo , B.machineNumber as machineNumber , A.id , A.deviceIdx , A.currentDateTime , A.location , A.pileNo , A.pileStandard , A.drillingDepth , A.intrusionDepth , A.balance , A.connectLength , A.managedStandard , A.avgPenetrationValue , A.totalPenetrationValue , A.hammaT , A.fallMeter , A.pileType , A.method , A.isDel , A.totalConnectWidth , A.ultimateBearingCapacity , A.crossSection , A.hammaEfficiency , A.modulusElasticity , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 0,1) as peOne , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 1,1) as peTwo , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 2,1) as peThree , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 3,1) as peFour , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 4,1) as peFive , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 5,1) as peSix , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 6,1) as peSeven , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 7,1) as peEight , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 8,1) as peNine , (SELECT VALUE FROM TB_PENETRATION WHERE reportIdx = A.id LIMIT 9,1) as peTen , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "단본" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piOne , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "하단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piTwo , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 0,1),'') as piThree , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "중단" LIMIT 1,1),'') as piFour , ifnull((SELECT IF(VALUE = 0, '', VALUE) as VALUE FROM TB_PIECE WHERE reportIdx = A.id and name = "상단" ORDER BY TB_PIECE.id ASC LIMIT 0, 1 ),'') as piFive , A.createDate , C.role , IF(A.bigo = 'null','',A.bigo) as bigo , IF(A.sprCol1 = 'null','',A.sprCol1) as sprCol1 , B.constructionIdx FROM TB_REPORT A , TB_DEVICE B, TB_CONSTRUCTION C WHERE 1=1 AND A.deviceIdx = B.id AND B.constructionIdx = C.id AND C.id = #{constructionIdx} AND B.machineNumber = #{machineNumber} AND A.isdel = 0 ORDER BY A.createDate asc ) as TB WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY machineNumber , createDate ASC;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT D.reportIdx, COUNT(*) FROM TB_CONSTRUCTION A, TB_DEVICE B , (SELECT * FROM TB_REPORT AA AND AA.deviceIdx = #{param.id} AND AA.isDel = 0 ) C , TB_PENETRATION D WHERE A.id = B.constructionIdx AND B.id = C.deviceIdx AND C.id = D.reportIdx AND A.ID = #{param.constructionIdx} AND D.value > 0 GROUP BY D.reportIdx HAVING COUNT(*) > 5) A
